mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.model_code, m.display_name, m.description, m.supports_streaming, m.supports_tool_calling, m.supports_vision, m.supports_cache, p.currency_code, p.input_price_per_million, p.output_price_per_million, p.cache_write_price_per_million, p.cache_read_price_per_million FROM tenant_model m JOIN tenant_model_price p ON p.tenant_model_id = m.id AND p.expired_at IS NULL JOIN tenant tn ON tn.id = m.tenant_id WHERE m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND m.publish_status = 'ENABLED' AND m.enabled = TRUE AND tn.deleted_at IS NULL AND tn.enabled = TRUE AND (tn.expire_at IS NULL OR tn.expire_at > NOW()) AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model_candidate_mapping mp JOIN provider_channel_model cm ON cm.id = mp.provider_channel_model_id JOIN provider_channel c ON c.id = cm.provider_channel_id WHERE mp.tenant_model_id = m.id AND mp.enabled = TRUE AND mp.deleted_at IS NULL AND cm.enabled = TRUE AND cm.deleted_at IS NULL AND c.enabled = TRUE AND c.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY m.display_name ASC, m.id ASC
